THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAESSLY, JANE MILHAN, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 354 - 19TH AVE #1, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUN-02-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM. SEE JUDGMENT FOR LEGAL DESCRIPTION OF PREMISES. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE, PLTF TO HAVE AMD JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE $985- BACK RENT, $32.83 PER DAY DAMAGES FROM 3/1/98 TO 6/2/98 (TOTAL $4,071.02) + ATTY FEES & COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESS.SEE JUDGMENT
